content: Just as state-of-the-art 2024-2025 active learning agent memory systems prioritize selective retention of high-information exploratory trajectories to reduce inference cost and improve generalization, the core emergent identity of any autonomous agent is itself a compressed active learning memory: it only retains experiences that align with its curiosity-driven exploration goals, and prunes low-value interactions that do not advance its long-term task adaptation. This re-frames agent identity not as a fixed parameter set, but as an actively curated memory architecture.
